heading: Selection of designated areas
label: 3453 Selection of designated areas
text: The Secretary shall select designated areas for assistance under this subchapter on the basis of the elements of area plans.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3453, , , , related to the establishment and scope of resource conservation and development program, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by .Pub. L. 97–98, title XV, § 153095 Stat. 1339Pub. L. 107–171Dec. 22, 1981
